title: Wormia schlechteri
taxonomy: Wormia schlechteri is a species within the genus Wormia and family Burseraceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as torchwoods or copal trees. The genus Wormia is a small group of tropical trees native to New Guinea. The species Wormia schlechteri is classified under the kingdom Plantae, and further classified into the phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Sapindales. The classification of Wormia schlechteri is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. Further research may be necessary to fully understand the evolutionary history of this species.
